company.name: COB Company
company.about: COB Company is a leading provider of business consulting and digital transformation services. Founded in 2010, it serves clients across finance, healthcare, retail, and technology sectors.

services.Business Consulting: Strategy, operations, market entry, and organizational design.
services.Digital Transformation: Cloud migration, ERP implementation, and process automation.
services.Product Development: Custom software, mobile apps, and AI-powered solutions.
services.Training & Workshops: Corporate upskilling, agile coaching, and leadership training.

pricing.project_pricing: Project-based pricing is available for large engagements with a custom quote.
pricing.discovery_call: All new clients get a free 30-minute discovery call.

contact.live_chat: live chat on the website is available 24/7

cancellation_refund: Appointments can be cancelled up to 24 hours in advance for a full refund.
Project deposits (30%) are non-refundable after kick-off.

faq.reschedule: To reschedule an appointment, contact support@cobcompany.com or call at least 24 hours before the scheduled time.
faq.remote_consultations: Yes. All services are available remotely via Zoom or Google Meet. Just mention that you prefer a remote meeting when booking.
faq.project_duration: Typical timelines: small projects take 2–4 weeks, medium projects take 1–3 months, and large transformations take 6–12 months.
